hero_arabic_trans: Koi nafs nahi jaanta kal kya kamaega — (Quran 31:34)
hero_sub: Islami tarikh, dunyawi waqiyaat aur maanidaar baseerat ke zariye apni timeline daryaft karein.
hero_quote: Aur yeh na samjho ke Allah zalimon ke aamal se be-khabar hai.
input_title: Apni paidaish ki tafseelaat se shuru karein
input_sub: Yeh hamein aapki zaati timeline banane mein madad karta hai.
input_err_future: Tarikh-e-paidaish mustaqbil mein nahi ho sakti.
input_err_year: Barahkaram 1900 ke baad ka saal darj karein.
loading_1: Aapka waqt tahleel ho raha hai…
loading_2: Aapki Islami tarikh hisaab ho rahi hai…
glance_days_desc: Aapko diya gaya waqt ka safar.
glance_sleep_desc: Aapki zindagi ka taqreeban ek tihai.
glance_sunsets_desc: Aap ne hazaron khubsoorat ghuroob dekhe hain.
reflect_days: Aap {days} din ji chuke hain. In mein se kitne din aapko Allah ke qareeb le gaye?
reflect_hours: Yeh zindagi ke {hours} ghantay hain. Kitne aisay guzray jis par aap Qayamat ke din fakhr kar sakein?
reflect_sleep: Aap ne taqreeban {sleep} saal sonay mein guzaray. Kya aapka aaram ibadat ki taqat ke liye tha — ya sirf dunya ke liye?
reflect_hearts: Aapka dil baghair rukay {hearts} arab baar dhadka. In mein se kitni dhadkanen us ki yaad mein theen jo ise chalata hai?
reflect_sunsets: Aap ne {sunsets} ghuroob-e-aftaab dekhe — har ek Allah ki nishani. Kya aap ne kabhi kisi ek par Alhamdulillah kaha?
reflect_seconds: Zindagi ke {seconds} million seconds. Har ek record hai. Har ek ka hisaab hoga.
ih_hajj_text: Aap ne {n} Hajj ke mausam guzaray hain.
world_moment_text: Duniya mukhtalif thi, lekin aapka safar abhi shuru hua tha.
journey_completed: Aap ne apni mutawaqqa zindagi ka {pct}% mukammal kar liya hai.
journey_cta: Apna waqt samajhdaari se istemal karein.
journey_note: Aosaat umar 75 saal ki bunyaad par
reflection_body: Aapka har guzra lamha aapke safar ka hissa hai. Baqi ko baamaani banaein.
truth_intro: Aap {years} saal ji chuke hain. Yeh hai ke woh waqt kahan gaya — aalami aosaat ki bunyaad par.
story_closing: Aapki kahani abhi likhi ja rahi hai. ✦
share_sub: Apni Islami timeline banaein aur apne pyaron ke saath share karein.
tracker_sub: Apni rozana ibadat track karein — aapke alay par mehfooz, sirf aapke liye.
qibla_note: Aapke alay ka maqaam istemal karta hai. Kuch bhi mehfooz ya bheja nahi jaata.
qibla_note_saved: Aapki aakhri mehfooz qibla simt dikha raha hai.
qibla_note_found: Dikhayi gayi simt ki taraf rukh karein. Allah Akbar.
qibla_tap: Qibla talash karne ke liye tap karein
qibla_body: Qibla Makkah mein Masjid al-Haram ki simt hai — woh simt jis ki taraf Musalman namaz mein rukh karte hain.
qibla_ayah_tr: "Apna rukh Masjid al-Haram ki taraf kar lo." — (Quran 2:144)
liveage_sub_empty: Apni live umar dekhne ke liye upar tarikh-e-paidaish darj karein.
liveage_sub_active: Har second ahem hai. Aapki umar, live.
bday_sub_empty: Saalgirah ki ginti dekhne ke liye tarikh-e-paidaish darj karein.
bday_today_sub: Alhamdulillah — Allah aapke aanay walay saal ko barkat de. 🤲
mirror_sub: Ek lamha lein. Saans lein. Ghaur karein.
continue_btn_2: Dekhein Aapka Waqt Kahan Jaata Hai ✦
footer_tagline: Aapke waqt ka aaina. Aapki zindagi ki rahnumai.
footer_made: Ek baamaani zindagi ke liye ♥ se banaya gaya
mirror_questions: Kal aap ne kya kiya jo aapki aakhirat mein kaam aayega?
Agar aaj aapki zindagi khatam ho jaye — kya aap Allah se milne ke liye tayyar hain?
Abhi aapke paas waqt hai. Lekin laa-mehdood nahi. Aaj aap is ke saath kya karenge?
Aap ne aakhri baar Allah ke khauf ya mohabbat mein kab roya?
Kya aaj aap woh shakhs hain jise aap yaad rakhna chahte hain?
Aapki rozana ki kitni aadatein aapki aakhirat bana rahi hain — aur kitni sirf dunya ke liye?
Agar Allah aapko pichhle 7 dinon ki recording dikhaye — kya aap itminan se dekh saktay hain?
Aapki zindagi mein kaun hai jise abhi aapki meherbani ki zaroorat hai — aur kya aap de rahe hain?
Kya aap ek saal pehle se aaj Allah ke zyada qareeb hain?
Woh ek kaam kya hai jo aap apne deen ke liye taltay rehte hain — aur kyun?
Aapke walidain hamesha nahi rahenge. Kya aap ne aaj unki izzat ki?
Quran Allah ka kalaam hai. Aap ne aakhri baar ise kab parha — khatam karne ke liye nahi, balke mehsoos karne ke liye?
Aap Allah ke saamne akele kharay honge. Koi aapki taraf se nahi bolega. Kya aap us lamhe ki tayyari kar rahe hain?
Agar aapko maloom ho ke sirf 30 din baqi hain to aap apni zindagi mein kya badlenge?
Kya abhi aapka dil sukoon mein hai? Agar nahi — to aap aur Allah ke darmiyan kya haail hai?
